summary: A modular Go CLI tool for controlling and querying various macOS system components like apps, audio, bluetooth, and power.
concerns: untracked file in git status indicates incomplete commit hygiene
flat module structure under internal/modules may become unwieldy as features grow
empty lib/ and bin/ directories at root suggest mixed tooling or outdated structure
self-update system introduces supply chain security considerations
suggestions: commit or gitignore the untracked file to maintain clean state
evaluate if modules need further sub-categorization as the project scales
consolidate root-level lib/ and bin/ into standard Go build artifacts or remove them
add checksum verification to the self-update system for security
